clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the broad processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and mood state regulation inherently linked to macroscopic cortico-amygdala and insulo-cingulate dynamics.
These terms converge on the computation of reward, subjective preferences, and motivation during goal-directed behavior, mapping onto large-scale mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry.

This domain encompasses internally generated, abstract representations of the self and others across time, relying extensively on the intrinsic functional architecture of default mode associative networks.
